span.p:
Rung 0 — re-output a stored result
0 model tokens · SHIPPED

div.style: color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Rung 2 — demand-page top-k
k pages, not 350k · SHIPPED

div.style: color: rgb(51, 66, 79) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rung 3 — vDSO-cached recall
0 on a hit · NOT BUILT (global worldVer caveat)

div.style: color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rung 4 — witness-gated re-admit (THE MOAT)
microseconds, no tokens · SHIPPED

div.style: color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Rung 5 — KV-checkpoint re-attach
OFF-THESIS (caching already banks ~94%)

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: ⚡ lead with rung 4 (the moat); the 'free' rungs are the least defensible
